title: Faithful: PAEZoomBlur param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 16.1 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEZoomBlur must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEZoomBlur to range extremes across hosts ['Blurs__Zoom'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=16.12 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEZoomBlur implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEZoomBlur` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Blurs__Zoom", "param": "mix", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 32.633, "ddb": 16.122}, {"host": "Blurs__Zoom", "param": "amount", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 39.478, "ddb": 16.204}, {"host": "Blurs__Zoom", "param": "mix", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.5, "oracle_signal": 34.301, "ddb": 16.713}, {"host": "Blurs__Zoom", "param": "amount", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 37.098, "ddb": 16.744}, {"host": "Blurs__Zoom", "param": "mix", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 21.192, "ddb": 16.914}, {"host": "Blurs__Zoom", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.5, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 10.657, "ddb": 18.213}]
